page.intro: Operational register closing (TSE/RKSV): run the pre-check and closing. For the formal daily report (document, finalization, FinanzOnline), use “Formal daily report”.

register.fixedRegisterHint: No selection needed — this tenant uses the configured register.
register.noRegistersTitle: No register found for this tenant. Create a register or check permissions.
register.noListDescription: Permission cash_register.view is missing — enter register ID manually as UUID.

backdated.infoTitle: Daily closing for a specific day
backdated.infoDescription: Choose the business day for the daily closing. Past days can be closed as late (nachträglich) closings.
backdated.warningDescription: The daily closing will be created for {{date}}. Late creation remains transparently auditable. The creation timestamp itself is not backdated.
backdated.legalLineDate: The daily closing will be created for {{date}}.
backdated.legalLineAudit: Late creation is transparently recorded in the audit log.
backdated.legalLineInspection: In a tax audit (Betriebsprüfung) you must be able to explain the reason for the delay.
backdated.customReasonPlaceholder: Describe why this closing is being created late

reasons.forgot: I forgot to create the daily closing

actions.modalContent: RKSV-relevant operation. Only run when the register is ready from a business perspective.
actions.modalContentBackdated: Late closing for {{date}}. Creation time stays the real current UTC time (same honesty as late Monatsbeleg).

history.createdAtBackdatedHint: Actual creation time — not the original business day

messages.warningDailyNotAllowed: Daily closing for the selected date is not allowed (already done, future date, or prerequisites missing).
messages.warningDailyAlreadyClosed: Daily closing was already performed on {{dateTime}}.
messages.warningMonthlyNotAllowed: Monthly closing is not available for this month (already performed or prerequisites missing).
messages.warningMonthlyAlreadyClosed: Monthly closing was already performed on {{dateTime}}.
messages.warningYearlyNotAllowed: Yearly closing is not available for this year (already performed or prerequisites missing).
messages.warningYearlyAlreadyClosed: Yearly closing was already performed on {{dateTime}}.
messages.pdfUnavailable: No PDF is available for this entry.
messages.pdfAutoDownloadFailed: Closing succeeded, but the PDF could not be downloaded.

errors.pdfDownload: Could not download the PDF report.
